description: The intended goal or function of a system or project.
The methods or approaches applied in developing a system.
The enhancements or benefits resulting from a system.
The parts or elements of a neural network or system.
The software or tools employed in a system or pipeline.
The measurable outcomes achieved by a system.
The measures used to assess model performance.
The structure or design of a model.
The technique used for real-time processing.
The specific algorithms developed or implemented.
The explanation of a heuristic method and its mechanism.
